title: release-gate block metadata
description: Artifact emitted by the release-gate lego block after a manual approval is granted via a GitHub environment with required reviewers.

status.description: Gate outcome. 'approved' means a reviewer approved the deployment to the environment.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the approval was granted and the job began executing.

environment.description: GitHub environment name that was used for the approval gate (e.g. release-approval).

actor.description: GitHub username of the actor who triggered the workflow run (not necessarily the approver).

ref.description: Git ref that triggered the pipeline (e.g. refs/heads/main).
